name: openpi
tagline: A frontier robot policy, weights and all
description: Physical Intelligence's open release of its flow-based vision-language-action models. π0 is pretrained on 10,000+ hours of robot data; π0.5 adds open-world generalization via 'knowledge insulation'; π0-FAST is an autoregressive variant. Base models ship with DROID, ALOHA, and LIBERO checkpoints.
why: A rare fully open (Apache-2.0, weights included) release of a frontier generalist robot policy from a leading robotics-foundation-model company — the kind of model that's usually locked away entirely.
useCases: Fine-tuning a real VLA on new robots and tasks
audience: Robotics researchers, advanced ML engineers, robot-learning labs

setup.requirements: A >8GB GPU for inference; a 4090 for LoRA fine-tuning; A100/H100-class for full fine-tuning

limitations: Developed for PI's own robots, so it may need adaptation on standard platforms, and compute needs are heavy.
take: When a robotics-foundation-model company open-sources its actual policy, the field moves. This is that release.
